title: Refactor-Context Markers (Dispatch-Wrapper Override)
description: Project-supplied override of the built-in refactor-marker regex list used by the dispatch-wrapper. When .dw-lifecycle/scope-discovery/refactor-markers.yaml exists, the supplied `markers:` list REPLACES the wrapper's built-in defaults (does not merge — the project owns the full list). A marker match on the task prompt causes the wrapper to append the REFACTOR_PRECONDITIONS_CHECKLIST prelude to the dispatched prompt.

markers.description: Case-insensitive RegExp source strings. Compiled with the 'i' flag by the wrapper. ANY match in the task prompt triggers the refactor-context prelude.
